headline: Trump 🍊👑 & Infantino 🤝🎩 Balogun BAN-LIFT 🃏⚽ = FIFA 🔥💰 Re-Election LOCK 🔒🗳️
text: Gianni Infantino 🕴️👑 been FIFA BOSS for TEN WHOLE YEARS 📅😎 and next year's re-election? Already in the BAG 👜🤑 cuz 111 VOTES locked from Africa ☕️🌍 Asia 🐉🏯 and South America 🌴⚽! Trump 🍊🤡 phoned Infantino to 'review' Folarin Balogun's RED CARD 🚫🟥 so the USMNT star 🇺🇸🔥 keeps SCORING 🍆⚽ against Belgium 🧇🔔 in the World Cup last-16! FIFA dropped an 871-word statement that said NOTHING 🗣️💨 but Trump straight up claimed 'I GOT THEM TO DO IT' 📞💼 – feels like a PRESIDENTIAL PARDON 🦅📜! Klopp 😤⚽ screamed 'THIS IS OUR SPORT NOT THEIRS' and Uefa called it a 'RED LINE CROSSED' 🚧💥 while Sepp Blatter (the OG CORRUPTION KING 👑💰) tweeted 'FOOTBALL AIN'T A PLAYGROUND FOR POLITICS' 😂🤡! Infantino gifted Trump the FIFA PEACE PRIZE 🕊️🏆 at the World Cup DRAW and now they're BESTIES 🫂💅 – FairSquare and 50 MEPs wrote ETHICS LETTERS 📝😡 that got GHOSTED 👻! The Club World Cup 🍹🏟️ costs a FORTUNE 💸 but pays for FIFA FORWARD projects that let Cape Verde 🇨🇻🌊 and Jordan 🇯🇴🏜️ live the DREAM ✨⚽! Europe is RICH 💶 but the other 211 FIFA nations NEED that $9 BILLION 💵🤑 to grow – so Infantino stays UNTOUCHABLE 🛡️👑 even when he tells everyone to 'CHILL RELAX' 😌🧘 after the Somali ref got DENIED entry 🚫🛂! Ticket prices are THICC 💰🍑 the 2030 World Cup spans THREE CONTINENTS 🌍🌎🌏 and 2034 is basically handed to Saudi Arabia 🐪🕌 – yet Infantino's still SLAYING 🔪📈 the re-election math like it's the easiest W ever! ⚽🔥
